_instructions: Fill in this template for each test document. This is used by evaluate.py to measure pipeline accuracy.

_fields.document_id: Unique identifier matching the uploaded filename
_fields.diseases[].name: Canonical disease name as it appears in the note
_fields.diseases[].meat_valid: true if Assessment + at least one of M/E/T is documented
_fields.diseases[].negated: true if the condition is denied/absent/ruled out
_fields.diseases[].section: Which section the disease primarily appears in (e.g. assessment_and_plan)

documents.notes: Add or remove diseases as needed. Only include conditions that a human coder would code.
